steps.title: Set up the percent increase equation
steps.content:
A 31.25% increase means the final value equals the original value times 1.3125. If $x$ is the number on May 1:
$$168 = 1.3125x$$

steps.title: Backsolve to find the initial value
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B (116):
$$1.3125 \times 116 = 152.25 \neq 168$$
Fails. Testing choice A (128):
$$1.3125 \times 128 = 128 + 40 = 168$$
That confirms A is correct.
